name: pipeline-crew
description: The kamp.us pipeline crew: four channel-native agent defs on a flat topology (cartographer + intake-desk + chief-of-staff bridges, plus the engineering-manager engine pool) that conduct the kampus-pipeline skills as a standing crew. Roles address each other over the @kampus/pipeline-crew-mcp channel substrate and ship the crew doctrine as the default; every operator-specific detail is supplied per install through the personalization seam, so the plugin carries zero operator data. Governed by the crew roster law (ADR 0189).
